description: End-to-end CV analysis web app: React frontend + FastAPI backend + Celery pipeline (ingest → extract → score → score_ats → salary → explain → analyze_content → assemble) + Platy MCP server for salary data + GPT-4 via OpenRouter for CV structuring, explanation, content analysis, and ATS scoring.

parallelGroups.note: Architecture schema doc must complete before any rich-breakdown implementation.
Backend scoring enrichment and frontend type update run in parallel — both depend only on task-7.
LLM prompt update requires task-8 (CategoryBreakdown schema) to be in place.
ScoreGauge UI update requires task-10 (types) to be done.
QA full pass runs after all implementation tasks complete.
CV Content Analysis backend task — no dependencies, can run in isolation.
Frontend ContentAnalysis component — depends on task-13 (schema defines the types).
ATS Scoring backend — new Celery task, new Pydantic models, new prompts, pipeline insertion. No dependencies on other pending tasks.
ATS Scoring frontend — new ATSAnalysis component + TypeScript types. Depends on task-15 to know the exact data shape.

notes: Original 6 tasks (task-1 through task-6) cover initial project build. Tasks task-7 through task-12 cover the rich score breakdown feature enhancement. Tasks task-13 and task-14 cover the CV Content Analysis feature. Tasks task-15 and task-16 cover the new ATS Scoring feature: a non-critical Celery task that runs only when a job description is provided, performing keyword match analysis, requirements mapping, ATS score (0-100), priority gap grouping, and truth-preserving tailoring suggestions; plus the corresponding React component with a radial gauge, keyword table, requirements mapping cards, priority gaps by severity, and tailoring suggestions.
